search-placeholder: Search for an address or place
vote-tooltip-agree_one: Click if you agree this label is correct. {{count}} validator has agreed.
vote-tooltip-agree_other: Click if you agree this label is correct. {{count}} validators have agreed.
vote-tooltip-disagree_one: Click if you think this label is incorrect. {{count}} validator has disagreed.
vote-tooltip-disagree_other: Click if you think this label is incorrect. {{count}} validators have disagreed.
vote-tooltip-unsure_one: Click if you're unsure whether this label is correct. {{count}} validator wasn't sure whether it was correct or incorrect.
vote-tooltip-unsure_other: Click if you're unsure whether this label is correct. {{count}} validators weren't sure whether it was correct or incorrect.
vote-tooltip-ai-included: Our AI's vote is included in this count.
tags-tooltip: Attributes the labeler applied to describe the problem
why-unsure: Tell us what makes you unsure…
own-label-disabled: You cannot validate or comment on your own label
no-imagery-disabled: You cannot validate or comment when no imagery is available for this label

story.heading: Community stories
story.delete-confirm: Permanently delete your story? This can't be undone.
story.submitted: Your story is now public on this label.
story.composer-intro: How has this barrier affected you? Your story appears publicly on this label.
story.text-placeholder: In your own words — what happened here, or what does a problem like this mean for you day to day?
story.photo-alt-label: Describe the photo for people who can't see it
story.photo-alt-skip: My story already fully describes this photo
story.photo-alt-required: Please describe the photo, or check the box if your story already describes it.
story.privacy-note: Stories are public and may be seen by anyone viewing this label. You can permanently delete your story at any time from this card or from your dashboard. Photos are checked by moderators.
story.no-photo-description: The author didn't add a photo description.

error.generic: Something went wrong and your story wasn't posted. Please try again.
error.text-rejected: Your story contains language we can't publish.
error.already-exists: You've already shared a story on this label.
error.rate-limited: You've shared several stories recently — please try again tomorrow.
error.photo-too-large: That photo is too large to upload.
error.photo-invalid: We couldn't read that file as an image (JPEG or PNG).
